resources.string: Hello! I\'m your AI wellness assistant. I can help you understand your stress patterns. What would you like to know?
Based on your data, your stress levels peak on Tuesdays. Consider more sleep on Mondays.
Track your cortisol levels, analyze patterns, and get personalized recommendations to manage stress effectively.
We need a few permissions to provide you with accurate stress insights
Monitor your physical activity and movement patterns to better predict stress levels
Receive timely alerts and reminders to check in and manage stress
Three simple steps to better stress management
Log your daily physiological, psychological, and lifestyle data
AI analyzes your patterns to predict cortisol levels and stress risk
Get personalized recommendations to reduce stress and prevent burnout
Sign in to continue your wellness journey
Join CortiSense to start your stress-free journey
Please enter a valid email address
Password must be at least 8 characters
Enter your email address and we\'ll send you a link to reset your password
Help us understand your day to provide better insights
How is your mood right now?
How many hours did you sleep?
Our AI is processing your inputs to predict stress levels and cortisol risk
Great job! You\'ve completed today\'s check-in.
Your stress levels dropped by 15% this week.
Your stress level is elevated. Take a 5-minute break.
Check in today to activate streak
Remind me to log my daily data
Notify when stress levels are high
Each daily check-in adds 1 day to your streak.
Your stress is high. Start a 5-min session now to lower cortisol.
Prioritize your mental health. Delay stressful tasks.
Maintain your calm with a short mindfulness session
Improve sleep quality with our bedtime routine
Go to bed and wake up at the same time every day
Stop using devices 1 hour before sleep
Start your day with a gentle walk to reduce cortisol
Unlock full AI potential, advanced wellness reports, and ad-free experience!
Track physiological, psychological, and lifestyle factors
Receive instant stress predictions and insights
Follow personalized recommendations to reduce stress
I\'ve been tracking my wellness with CortiSense! My average stress score this week is %1$d. Join me! #CortiSense
Your stress levels are critically high. Please take immediate action to reduce stress.
Your stress levels are higher than usual. We recommend taking a break.
Your stress levels are a bit higher than usual. Consider taking some time to relax.
Your stress levels are low and well-managed. You\'re doing an amazing job!
I\'m having trouble connecting. Please try again.
Based on your latest analysis, your stress score is %1$d.
Your stress level is elevated. I recommend a 5-minute breathing session to help lower your cortisol.
Your stress level looks healthy! Keep maintaining your current routine.
You logged %1$s of sleep today. Good rest is the foundation of stress resilience.
Hello! I\'m your CortiSense assistant. How can I help you today?
I understand. Managing stress is important. Would you like to see your latest trends or try a breathing exercise?
I\'ve noticed your stress levels are improving compared to your previous check-ins. Great job on staying mindful!
Your stress levels have been slightly higher recently. It might be time to prioritize some self-care or adjustment in your workload.
I need a few more days of data to accurately analyze your weekly trends. Keep checking in!
I see that %1$s are contributing to your stress. Focusing on these specific areas with our targeted exercises could help.
Since your goal is to %1$s, I recommend tracking your data more consistently to see how different activities affect your progress.
Impressive! You\'re on a %1$d day streak. Consistency is the key to mastering your wellness.
Your sleep patterns suggest you might benefit from a more consistent bedtime routine to improve your recovery.
Work-related stress can be tough. Try taking short "micro-breaks" every hour to reset your nervous system.
Taking small steps daily leads to big changes. Remember to be kind to yourself.
Let me analyze your recent data for you...
I hear you. Balancing professional demands with personal well-being is a common challenge that can weigh heavily on the mind.
Sleep is our body\'s way of processing the day\'s emotions. It\'s understandable to feel frustrated when that rest is elusive.
Feeling disconnected is a deeply human experience. Please know that you\'re not alone in this journey, and I\'m here to listen.
Thank you for sharing that with me. Acknowledging your feelings is the first and most important step toward healing.
Your recent patterns suggest you\'re in a heightened state of alertness. This is your body\'s natural protective response, but it needs a moment to reset.
Taking a moment for stillness isn\'t just about relaxation; it\'s about rebuilding your mental resilience and reclaiming your peace.
I\'m proud of you for checking in and reflecting on these feelings. We will take this journey one step at a time.
I see you\'ve been consistent with your check-ins lately. This dedication to self-awareness is exactly how lasting change happens.
No data to analyze factors yet. Complete more check-ins!
We need a few permissions to provide you with accurate stress insights
Three simple steps to better stress management
Sign in to continue your wellness journey
Enter your email address and we\'ll send you a link to reset your password
Join CortiSense to start your stress-free journey
Track your stress patterns over time
Your stress levels have decreased by 34% over the past 4 months. This indicates significant improvement in stress management.
Stay updated on your wellness journey
Help us understand your day to provide better insights
%1$d%% of your check-ins were in the low stress zone. Keep using CortiSense to maintain these healthy patterns.
Each factor\'s impact based on your recent check-ins
Managing %1$s seems to be the most effective way to reduce your stress right now. Try focusing on this for the next few days.
What you eat directly affects your stress hormone levels. A balanced diet helps regulate cortisol and improve mood.
Find a quiet place and get comfortable
You\'ve completed your breathing exercise. Keep up the excellent work!
Notifications help you stay on track with your wellness goals. You can customize which alerts you receive.
Quality sleep is crucial for managing stress. Poor sleep increases cortisol levels and makes it harder to cope with daily stressors.
Regular physical activity reduces stress hormones and triggers endorphin release, improving your mood and reducing anxiety.
All your health data is encrypted and stored securely. We never share your personal information with third parties.
CortiSense is an AI-powered stress monitoring application that helps you predict and prevent burnout by analyzing your physiological, psychological, and lifestyle data.
Your stress score reached 78, indicating elevated cortisol levels. This alert was triggered by multiple risk factors.
This is your 3rd high stress alert this week, occurring primarily in the afternoon. Consider adjusting your afternoon routine and taking regular breaks.
We encountered an error while processing your request. Please try again.
If this problem persists, please contact
You haven\'t logged any data yet. Complete your first daily check-in to start tracking your stress levels.
Choose your preferred format for the wellness report:
Thank you for being a premium member! You have access to all advanced AI features and personalized insights.
Unlock full AI potential, advanced wellness reports, and ad-free experience!
Your data is stored locally and securely. We only use your feedback to improve our AI models. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
When you\'re working or reading today, does your mind stay on task, or does it feel like a \'ping-pong ball\' jumping to different worries?
How easy was it to make simple choices today — like what to eat or what to wear?
Have you found yourself forgetting small things today — like where you put your keys?
If someone made a small mistake near you right now, would you let it go easily, or do you feel a \'spark\' of anger?
Think of something you usually enjoy. Does it feel exciting today, or does it just feel like \'another thing on the list\'?
Does your current to-do list feel like a challenge you can handle, or like a \'heavy weight\' pressing down?
Take a second — are your jaw and shoulders relaxed right now, or are you clenching them without realizing it?
Does your heart feel like it\'s beating normally, or do you feel an \'internal rushing\'?
When you woke up this morning, did you feel like your battery actually recharged, or did you feel \'drained\'?
In one sentence, how was your day? This helps the AI understand your emotional state.
Log one small achievement right now. This triggers dopamine — your brain\'s reward chemical that buffers against stress.
What went better than expected today? (Tap to write)
Pick a hobby — reading, music, a short walk. Keep your mind out of work mode and maintain the momentum.
Write every worry down — your brain is spending energy \'holding\' them in RAM. Once written, categorize: actionable vs. out-of-control.
3-2-1 Rule: No food 3 hrs before bed, no work 2 hrs, no screens 1 hr. Your brain needs to cool down tonight.
Turn off all non-essential notifications for the next 2 hours. Reclaim your attention bandwidth.
Inhale 4 sec · Hold 7 sec · Exhale 8 sec. This stimulates the Vagus Nerve and tells your heart to slow down.
Squeeze your fists for 5 seconds → release. Repeat for shoulders, jaw, and feet. This physically lowers cortisol.
Pick only 3 tasks for today. Hide the rest. Your prefrontal cortex is failing — don\'t give it a 20-item list.
The app is leading now. Follow these steps:
Sit down if you aren\'t already.
Drink a glass of water slowly.
Do not make any important decisions for 2 hours.
You marked both Overwhelm and Sleep Recovery as critically low. Your nervous system needs immediate support before we review results.
Look around slowly. Name 5 things you can see right now.
Feel your chair, your clothes, the floor. Notice the texture.
Stop and listen. Name 3 sounds in your environment.
Take a slow breath. What scents are present right now?
Notice any taste in your mouth right now.
The sun is up, where are you? ☀️
Your stress levels are waiting for their morning coffee. Let\'s log your mood!
Start your day with a clear mind. Tell us how you\'re feeling!
Your cortisol levels are calling for a quick check-in. Don\'t leave them hanging!
Log your data now and earn some shiny coins for your profile! 🪙
Your stress is hitting peak levels. Drop everything and breathe for 2 mins. NOW! 🌬️
You\'re at Critical. Let\'s do a quick mindfulness session before things get spicy! 🔥
Things are getting a bit tense. How about a quick stretch or some water? 💧
Don\'t let high stress take over. A short break is all you need.
You\'re in the yellow zone. A 5-min walk could turn that into green! 🌿
Moderate stress detected. Time for a quick mental reset!
You\'re in the Low stress zone. Keep doing what you\'re doing, you\'re a pro!
Stress levels are low. Want to earn more coins by trying an exercise? 🪙
Check-in now and boost your wellness score! 🚀
Zzz... was that a power nap? 😴
Log your sleep and see how it affects your focus!
Show off your streak in your profile. You\'re killing it!
Stress-free life looks good on you! 😍
Come back and see your progress for the week.
Stay hydrated and keep those cortisol levels in check!
Your mind is calling, give it a 2-minute recess in the app.
Monitor your physical activity and movement patterns to better predict stress levels
Receive timely alerts and reminders to check in and manage stress
Log your daily physiological, psychological, and lifestyle data
AI analyzes your patterns to predict cortisol levels and stress risk
Get personalized recommendations to reduce stress and prevent burnout
Enter your email to receive a password reset link
Reset link sent to your email!
Your stress levels are well-managed. Keep up the good work!
Consider taking some of our recommended actions to lower your stress.
Reminders to log your daily stress data
Alerts when high stress is detected
Fun tips and reminders to keep you healthy
We\'re here to help you reset.
This is based on your patterns.
CortiSense is an AI-powered stress management tool.
Your data is stored locally and securely.
Continue your current routine. Consistency is key to long-term stress resilience.
No data logged for this day
Consistency tracks how regularly you record your data. Frequent logging helps AI provide more accurate patterns and personalized health insights.
